attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F)

FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F STG_CSF_PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F,
(
select ASSIGNMENT_ID ,EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F
minus
select ASSIGNMENT_ID ,EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F
) ACM
where 
 ACM.ASSIGNMENT_ID = STG_CSF_PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.ASSIGNMENT_ID 
 and ACM.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = STG_CSF_PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
 and ACM.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE = STG_CSF_PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.REFRESH_DATETIME
